Heroic Path-Speaker — Male Erenlander Human Sorcerer: 16
Strength: 16 (+3) Dexterity: 17 (+3) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 11 (+0) Wisdom: 8 (-1) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: Speaker Alignment: Lawful Good
Ability Boosts: Charisma: 2; Intelligence: 1 Experience: 212243/225000 Level: 16 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 240/480
Ability Notes:
Ability Score Improvement: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Human Ability Adjustment: Ability Boost (Choose 2 from any)
Rallying Cry: +1 Charisma
Ability Boosts: 4 to distribute
Dragon Wings: Can use a bonus action to gain a 30' fly Speed
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +5
Feat Count: General: 5; Heroic: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Sorcerer (Dragon Ancestor): 1; Sorcerer (Metamagic): 3; Sorcerer (Sorcerous Origin): 1
Feats: Ability Score Improvement; Changed To The Core; Crowd Rouser; Rallying Cry; Scathing Rebuke; Well-Spoken Erenlander Human Features: Erenlander Skills; Human Ability Adjustment; Human Feat Bonus; Human Skills Sorcerer Features: Black Dragon; Distant Spell; Draconic Bloodline; Draconic Resilience; Dragon Ancestor; Dragon Wings; Elemental Affinity; Empowered Spell; Font Of Magic; Heightened Spell; Metamagic; Save Proficiency (Constitution; Charisma); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion); Sorcerous Origin; Spellcasting; Weapon Proficiency (Dagger; Dart; Sling; Quarterstaff; Light Crossbow) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Dragon Ancestor: 1 selection
Human Feat Bonus: +1 general feat
Metamagic: 3 selections
Sorcerous Origin: 1 selection
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +3 Insight: (wis) -1 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) -1 Intimidation: (cha) +12 Persuasion: (cha) +12
Arcana: (int) +5 Investigation: (int) +5 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +8 Medicine: (wis) -1 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +8
Deception: (cha) +12 Nature: (int) +0 Stealth: (dex) +3
History: (int) +0 Perception: (wis) +4 Survival: (wis) -1
Skill Proficiency: Arcana; Athletics; Deception; Intimidation; Investigation; Perception; Persuasion; Religion; Sleight Of Hand
Expertise: Deception; Intimidation; Persuasion
Tool Proficiency: Carpenter's Tools; Land Vehicles
Languages: Draconic; Erenlander; Orcish
Skill Notes:
Draconic Bloodline: Language (Draconic)
Erenlander Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from any)/Tool Proficiency (Land Vehicles; Choose 1 from any Artisan's Tools)
Human Skills: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)/Language (Erenlander; Choose 1 from any)
Well-Spoken: Expertise (Choose 3 from Deception, Intimidation, Persuasion)
Well-Spoken: Skill Proficiency (Deception; Intimidation; Persuasion)
Crowd Rouser: R50' Can charm and convince listeners (save DC 15 Wisdom negates) for 1 week once per short rest
Draconic Bloodline: +5 on proficient Charisma checks with dragons
Rallying Cry: R50' Successful DC 15 Persuasion gives allies 16 temporary hit points once per long rest
Scathing Rebuke: R50' Successful Intimidation vs. Insight stuns the target for 1 min or until damaged 3 times per long rest
Combat
Hit Points: 66 Initiative: +3 Armor Class: 16
Weapon Proficiency: Battleaxe; Dagger; Dart; Light Crossbow; Quarterstaff; Sling
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Battleaxe (+8 1d8+3 S [2h d10]); Dart (+8 1d4+3 P R20/60); Quarterstaff (+8 1d6+3 B [2h d8]); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +3
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +3
Draconic Resilience: +16 Hit Points/+3 Armor Class in no armor
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Changed To The Core: R50' Successful Persuasion vs. Insight causes the target foe with up to 8 Hit Dice to switch sides, or to flee if it has at least 9 Hit Dice, once per long rest
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Constitution
Save: Charisma: +7; Constitution: +5; Dexterity: +3; Intelligence: +0; Strength: +3; Wisdom: -1
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: S0: 6; S: 14 Spell Slots: S1: 4; S2: 3; S3: 3; S4: 3; S5: 2; S6: 1; S7: 1; S8: 1 Attack: S: +7 Spell DC: S: 15
Magic Notes:
Distant Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to double the range of a spell or to give a touch spell a 30' range
Elemental Affinity: Spells that deal acid damage inflict +2 HP; can spend 1 sorcery point when casting one to gain resistance to acid for 1 hr
Empowered Spell: Can spend 1 sorcery point to reroll 2 spell damage dice; can be used in addition to another Metamagic option
Font Of Magic: Can use 16 sorcery points per long rest and can use a bonus action to convert between sorcery points and spell slots
Heightened Spell: Can spend 3 sorcery points to inflict disadvantage on a target's initial save vs. a self spell
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the sorcerer spell list; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Ability Boost Allocation: 4 available vs. 3 allocated
